summary.en: AI notetaker that captures and summarizes your phone calls.
summary.zh: 為你電話通話做筆記的 AI 記錄工具。

highlight.en: Tetra uses AI to take notes on phone calls so you can focus on the conversation, recall details later, and keep your team in sync.
highlight.zh: Tetra 用 AI 為電話通話做筆記,讓你專注於對話、事後回顧細節,並讓團隊資訊同步。

summary.en: Marketing automation platform optimized for mobile and web.
summary.zh: 為行動與網頁優化的行銷自動化平台。

highlight.en: Marketfox simplifies marketing with AI, helping websites and apps attract, convert, and engage more visitors into customers across web and mobile.
highlight.zh: Marketfox 以 AI 簡化行銷,協助網站與 App 在網頁與行動端吸引、轉換並經營訪客成為顧客。

summary.en: Fast storage engine enabling direct search on highly compressed data.
summary.zh: 可直接在高度壓縮資料上搜尋的高速儲存引擎。

highlight.en: Terark's storage engine searches directly on compressed data, claiming 200X faster reads and 10X+ storage savings versus LevelDB and RocksDB, with Alibaba as a paying customer.
highlight.zh: Terark 的儲存引擎能直接在壓縮資料上搜尋,號稱讀取速度比 LevelDB 與 RocksDB 快 200 倍、儲存節省超過 10 倍,阿里巴巴為其付費客戶。

summary.en: A knowledge assistant for work that lives inside Slack.
summary.zh: 一款內建於 Slack 的工作知識助理。

highlight.en: Niles is a real-time wiki inside Slack that turns everyday chats and docs into organized, searchable team knowledge.
highlight.zh: Niles 是內建於 Slack 的即時 wiki,把日常聊天與文件轉化為有條理、可搜尋的團隊知識。

summary.en: Biotech delivering DNA, RNA, and charged molecules into cells using magnetic fields.
summary.zh: 運用磁場將 DNA、RNA 與帶電分子送入細胞的生技公司。

highlight.en: Sigma Genetics' magnetic-field delivery avoids arcing, scales easily, and is non-invasive for in vivo use, with applications from cell therapy and DNA vaccines to cancer drug delivery.
highlight.zh: Sigma Genetics 的磁場遞送技術避免電弧、易於擴展且適用於體內的非侵入式應用,涵蓋細胞療法、DNA 疫苗到癌症藥物遞送。

summary.en: Shopping app that gives deal-seekers discounts for short video reviews.
summary.zh: 讓愛找優惠的購物者拍短影音評論換折扣的購物 App。

highlight.en: Cartcam pays mobile creators in discounts to review products, monetizing video's pull on buyers while brands fund the discounts in exchange for sales-driving content.
highlight.zh: Cartcam 以折扣回饋拍評論的行動創作者,善用影音對買家的影響力,品牌則出資補貼折扣以換取帶動銷售的內容。

summary.en: Electrostimulation wearable for treating incontinence and other conditions.
summary.zh: 用於治療尿失禁等病症的電刺激穿戴裝置。

highlight.en: Volt Health's wearable stimulates muscles to give receptors feedback for incontinence, a $25B market, with founder experience bringing six prior medical devices to market.
highlight.zh: Volt Health 的穿戴裝置刺激肌肉、向受器提供回饋以治療尿失禁(250 億美元市場),創辦人具備將六款醫療器材推向市場的經驗。

summary.en: A podcast listening and discovery app.
summary.zh: 一款 Podcast 收聽與探索 App。

highlight.en: Breaker builds a social podcast app where listeners discover, connect, and give feedback, aiming to become the preferred home for premium podcasts through exclusive paid deals.
highlight.zh: Breaker 打造社群化的 Podcast App,讓聽眾探索、互動並提供回饋,並計畫透過獨家付費合作成為優質 Podcast 的首選平台。

summary.en: Lets people in Southeast Asia instantly order products from abroad.
summary.zh: 讓東南亞用戶即時訂購海外商品的服務。

highlight.en: Started by expats in Hong Kong, ZipX uses technology to make affordable international shopping for snacks, foods, and daily essentials seamless across Southeast Asia.
highlight.zh: 由香港的外籍人士創立,ZipX 運用科技讓東南亞用戶能無縫且平價地跨國採購零食、食品與日常必需品。

summary.en: Internet service provider bringing unlimited broadband to urban Africa.
summary.zh: 為非洲城市帶來無限量寬頻的網路服務供應商。

highlight.en: Tizeti taps Wi-Fi's wireless capacity and cheap solar to run low-cost owned towers, offering unlimited internet at customer-friendly prices across densely populated African cities.
highlight.zh: Tizeti 善用 Wi-Fi 的無線容量與廉價太陽能,營運低成本的自有基地台,在非洲人口密集城市提供平價的無限量網路。

summary.en: Push-button office coffee combining Keurig convenience with cafe quality.
summary.zh: 結合 Keurig 便利與咖啡館品質的一鍵式辦公室咖啡。

highlight.en: Pearl's compostable single-serve pods brew freshly roasted whole-bean coffee and tea for offices, with installation, upkeep, and auto-restocking handled and menus tailored to taste.
highlight.zh: Pearl 的可堆肥單杯膠囊為辦公室沖煮現烘的全豆咖啡與茶,並包辦安裝、維護與自動補貨,菜單依喜好客製。

summary.en: Experience music and art through augmented reality.
summary.zh: 透過擴增實境體驗音樂與藝術。

highlight.en: Wavy brings music and art to life through augmented reality, layering immersive visual experiences onto the world around you.
highlight.zh: Wavy 透過擴增實境讓音樂與藝術活起來,在你周遭的世界疊加沉浸式的視覺體驗。

summary.en: End-to-end office management platform for operations teams.
summary.zh: 為營運團隊打造的端到端辦公室管理平台。

highlight.en: Hivy lets office managers collect employee requests, run projects, assign tasks, and notify staff on completion; it was acquired by Managed by Q in 2017.
highlight.zh: Hivy 讓辦公室管理者收集員工需求、執行專案、指派任務並於完成時通知員工;2017 年被 Managed by Q 收購。

summary.en: Daily grocery and milk delivery service in India.
summary.zh: 印度的每日生鮮與牛奶配送服務。

highlight.en: Supr Daily uses daily milk subscriptions as a 'Trojan Cow' to slash last-mile costs and deliver groceries by 7am; it scaled to a $100M run rate before being acquired by Swiggy.
highlight.zh: Supr Daily 以每日訂奶作為「特洛伊乳牛」大幅降低最後一哩配送成本、於早上 7 點前送達生鮮;規模一度達 1 億美元年化營收,後被 Swiggy 收購。

summary.en: Travel subsidies that help rural laborers find work during the lean season.
summary.zh: 提供旅費補助、協助農村勞工在農閒季找工作的計畫。

highlight.en: No Lean Season gives poor rural laborers a $20 travel subsidy to find city jobs between planting and harvest, adding meals for families during seasonal poverty that affects 600M people.
highlight.zh: No Lean Season 提供貧困農村勞工 20 美元旅費補助,讓他們在播種與收成間的農閒期到城市找工作,為影響全球 6 億人的季節性貧困家庭增添餐食。

summary.en: Car ownership super app that saves time and money on car expenses.
summary.zh: 為汽車支出省時省錢的車主超級 App。

highlight.en: Jerry compares car insurance from 55+ carriers in 45 seconds, serves 3M+ customers as a licensed broker, and added auto refinancing plus free telematics-based safety services.
highlight.zh: Jerry 在 45 秒內比較 55 家以上保險公司的車險,以持牌經紀身分服務逾 300 萬客戶,並新增汽車再融資及免費的車聯網駕駛安全服務。

summary.en: Autonomous vehicle transit for cities and rural areas.
summary.zh: 為城市與鄉村提供自駕車運輸服務。

highlight.en: May Mobility has delivered 300,000+ autonomous rides, building self-driving shuttle solutions designed to complement public transit and make transportation safer and more accessible.
highlight.zh: May Mobility 已完成逾 30 萬趟自駕載客,打造旨在補足公共運輸的自駕接駁方案,讓交通更安全、更便利。

summary.en: Talent engagement platform for recruiting teams.
summary.zh: 為招募團隊打造的人才經營平台。

highlight.en: Gem unifies recruiter data from email, ATS, and LinkedIn into one source of truth, using automation and insights to improve hiring speed, quality, and diversity for teams at Dropbox and Cisco.
highlight.zh: Gem 將招募者在 email、ATS 與 LinkedIn 上的資料整合為單一真實來源,以自動化與洞察提升招募速度、品質與多元性,Dropbox、Cisco 等公司皆為客戶。

summary.en: Next-generation digital payments provider for Indian businesses.
summary.zh: 為印度企業打造的新世代數位支付服務商。

highlight.en: Cashfree powers 50,000+ Indian businesses with a payment gateway, bulk payouts API, UPI stack, and account-verification tools, counting Zomato, Cred, and Swiggy among its customers.
highlight.zh: Cashfree 以支付閘道、批量撥款 API、UPI 套件與帳戶驗證工具服務逾 5 萬家印度企業,Zomato、Cred、Swiggy 皆為其客戶。

summary.en: B2B payments platform that simplifies payouts at scale.
summary.zh: 簡化大規模付款的 B2B 支付平台。

highlight.en: Routable automates the payables process from invoice to settlement for finance teams, scaling from 100 to 100,000+ transactions while fitting into existing workflows.
highlight.zh: Routable 為財務團隊自動化從發票到結算的應付款流程,可從 100 筆擴展到逾 10 萬筆交易,並融入既有工作流程。

summary.en: Restaurant chain with chef-free, automated kitchens across Asia.
summary.zh: 在亞洲以無廚師自動化廚房營運的連鎖餐飲品牌。

highlight.en: Pop Meals builds Asian food brands through a network of cloud kitchens and tech-enabled quick-service outlets, backed by $28M+ from YC and Silicon Valley, Europe, and Asia investors.
highlight.zh: Pop Meals 透過雲端廚房與科技化的快速服務店網路打造亞洲食品品牌,獲 YC 及矽谷、歐洲、亞洲投資人逾 2,800 萬美元支持。

summary.en: AI-powered autonomous checkout for retail stores.
summary.zh: 為實體零售打造的 AI 自助結帳系統。

highlight.en: Standard AI's computer-vision platform lets shoppers grab what they want and leave without visiting a cashier, bringing autonomous checkout to existing retail stores.
highlight.zh: Standard AI 的電腦視覺平台讓顧客拿了想要的商品即可離店、無需結帳櫃台,為現有零售門市帶來自助結帳。

summary.en: Healthcare technology provider for hospitals across Africa.
summary.zh: 服務全非洲醫療機構的醫療科技供應商。

highlight.en: Helium Health offers HeliumOS electronic medical records and hospital management for emerging markets, plus provider lending, and has built Africa's largest health data repository with 1M+ records.
highlight.zh: Helium Health 為新興市場提供 HeliumOS 電子病歷與醫院管理系統,並提供醫療機構貸款,已建立非洲最大、逾百萬筆病歷的健康資料庫。

summary.en: The world's largest dating app for single Muslims seeking marriage.
summary.zh: 全球最大、為穆斯林單身者尋找婚姻對象的交友 App。

highlight.en: Built on the idea that Muslims marry rather than date, Muzz has over 10 million members and credits 500,000+ weddings, serving a large yet untapped global demographic.
highlight.zh: 基於「穆斯林結婚而非約會」的理念,Muzz 擁有逾 1,000 萬會員、促成超過 50 萬樁婚姻,服務龐大卻尚未被滿足的全球客群。

summary.en: Turns food waste into biochar to remove CO2 from the atmosphere.
summary.zh: 把食物廢棄物轉化為生物炭以去除大氣中的二氧化碳。

highlight.en: Releaf Earth produces premium biochar from palm kernel shells for carbon removal, aiming to boost African farmers' crop yields while advancing Net Zero goals.
highlight.zh: Releaf Earth 以棕櫚仁殼製造優質生物炭來移除碳,同時提升非洲農民的作物產量並推進淨零排放目標。

summary.en: On-demand dating and relationship coaching for individuals and couples.
summary.zh: 為個人與伴侶提供即時的約會與感情諮詢服務。

highlight.en: Relationship Hero instantly connects users with certified relationship coaches for actionable advice on dating, interpreting texts, rebuilding trust, and moving on after a breakup.
highlight.zh: Relationship Hero 讓用戶即時連上認證的感情教練,就約會、解讀訊息、重建信任與走出分手等情境提供可行建議。

summary.en: A CRM built for local businesses.
summary.zh: 專為在地企業打造的 CRM。

highlight.en: OneLocal offers cloud tools that work independently or together to automate customer engagement and drive revenue for local businesses, with no infrastructure or setup required.
highlight.zh: OneLocal 提供可獨立或整合運作的雲端工具,為在地企業自動化顧客經營並帶動營收,無需建置基礎設施或設定。

summary.en: Autonomous electric airplanes for cargo and crop protection.
summary.zh: 用於貨運與作物防護的自駕電動飛機。

highlight.en: Pyka designs and manufactures its own flight control software, avionics, motors, batteries, and carbon-fiber airframes, supplying autonomous electric aircraft for cargo and crop protection.
highlight.zh: Pyka 自行設計並製造飛控軟體、航電、馬達、電池與碳纖維機身,為貨運與作物防護供應自駕電動飛機。

summary.en: AI-powered sensing platform for building and facility management.
summary.zh: 用於建築與設施管理的 AI 感測平台。

highlight.en: VergeSense pairs image-sensor hardware with a cloud platform running machine learning models to report occupancy analytics back for smarter facility management.
highlight.zh: VergeSense 結合影像感測硬體與運行機器學習模型的雲端平台,回報空間使用分析,協助更聰明地進行設施管理。

summary.en: An SEC-regulated stock exchange aligning companies with long-term investors.
summary.zh: 受 SEC 監管、讓公司與長期投資人目標一致的證券交易所。

highlight.en: Founded by Lean Startup author Eric Ries, LTSE pairs its national securities exchange with LTSE Equity, a full-lifecycle cap table tool for managing startup equity from formation to IPO.
highlight.zh: 由《精實創業》作者 Eric Ries 創立,LTSE 將其全國性證券交易所與 LTSE Equity(從成立到 IPO 管理新創股權的全週期股權工具)結合。

summary.en: Speech-to-text and speech understanding models for building Voice AI apps.
summary.zh: 用於打造語音 AI 應用的語音轉文字與語音理解模型。

highlight.en: AssemblyAI provides speech-to-text and speech understanding models that top Voice AI companies rely on to launch products fast and scale with ease.
highlight.zh: AssemblyAI 提供語音轉文字與語音理解模型,頂尖語音 AI 公司倚賴它快速推出產品並輕鬆擴展。

summary.en: Cheese and dairy made from plant-derived dairy proteins.
summary.zh: 以植物衍生的乳蛋白製成的起司與乳製品。

highlight.en: Nobell Foods engineers plant-derived dairy proteins to make cheese and dairy products for the majority of consumers unwilling to compromise on taste or price.
highlight.zh: Nobell Foods 以植物衍生的乳蛋白製作起司與乳製品,服務不願在口味或價格上妥協的多數消費者。

summary.en: Career accelerator where you only pay after landing a job.
summary.zh: 找到工作後才付費的職涯加速器。

highlight.en: Pathrise offers weekly career coaching, network access, and job-search automation software to job seekers, charging only once they land a role.
highlight.zh: Pathrise 為求職者提供每週職涯輔導、人脈網路與求職自動化軟體,只在他們找到工作後才收費。

summary.en: Online coding school that's free until you land a high-paying job.
summary.zh: 在你找到高薪工作前完全免費的線上程式學校。

highlight.en: Bloom Institute of Technology trains students in computer science for free, taking a share of income only once graduates earn above a set threshold, and nothing if they never do.
highlight.zh: Bloom Institute of Technology 免費培訓學生資工技能,僅在畢業生收入超過特定門檻後才收取部分所得,若未達門檻則分文不取。

summary.en: Software and fulfillment network powering ecommerce delivery.
summary.zh: 驅動電商配送的軟體與履約物流網路。

highlight.en: Flowspace's OmniFlow software plus a network of 130+ fulfillment locations gives brands an ecommerce command center for fast, efficient delivery across every channel.
highlight.zh: Flowspace 的 OmniFlow 軟體搭配逾 130 個履約據點的網路,為品牌提供跨通路快速高效配送的電商指揮中心。

summary.en: High-definition radar that lets self-driving cars see in any condition.
summary.zh: 讓自駕車在各種環境下都能感知的高解析度雷達。

highlight.en: Zendar develops high-definition radar for autonomous vehicles, helping self-driving cars perceive their surroundings even in poor visibility.
highlight.zh: Zendar 為自駕車開發高解析度雷達,協助自駕車即使在能見度差的環境下也能感知周遭。

summary.en: Next-generation solar tracker for utility-scale solar farms.
summary.zh: 為公用事業級太陽能電廠打造的新世代追日支架。

highlight.en: Sunfolding's T29 horizontal single-axis tracker offers cost and performance breakthroughs, built by a team that has shipped gigawatts of solar at First Solar and SunPower.
highlight.zh: Sunfolding 的 T29 水平單軸追日支架帶來成本與效能突破,團隊曾在 First Solar、SunPower 等公司出貨數 GW 太陽能。

summary.en: Machine learning that helps companies decide who to hire.
summary.zh: 用機器學習協助企業決定錄用對象的工具。

highlight.en: Headstart uses machine learning to screen candidates by personality, behaviors, and motivations rather than just qualifications, aiming for faster, more inclusive hiring.
highlight.zh: Headstart 運用機器學習依個性、行為與動機篩選人選,而非僅看資歷,以達成更快速、更具包容性的招募。

summary.en: Fully insured peer-to-peer rental marketplace for everyday items.
summary.zh: 為日常物品提供完整保險的點對點租賃市集。

highlight.en: Fat Llama lets people rent spare items to nearby neighbors fully insured, offering a cheaper alternative to buying or rental shops while owners monetize rarely-used possessions.
highlight.zh: Fat Llama 讓人們在完整保險下把閒置物品出租給附近鄰居,提供比購買或租賃店更便宜的選擇,讓物主將少用的物品變現。

summary.en: Sales software for roofers with aerial measurements and instant proposals.
summary.zh: 為屋頂承包商打造、含空拍測量與即時報價的銷售軟體。

highlight.en: Roofr is an all-in-one sales toolbox for roofers, offering $10 aerial measurement reports and professionally designed, e-signable proposals generated in seconds.
highlight.zh: Roofr 是屋頂承包商的一站式銷售工具箱,提供 10 美元的空拍測量報告與數秒生成、可電子簽署的專業報價單。

summary.en: AI software that streamlines workflows for local government tax offices.
summary.zh: 以 AI 簡化地方政府稅務單位流程的軟體。

highlight.en: Just Appraised uses AI to make the property change-of-ownership process 10x faster for local tax assessors, easing paperwork and improving how offices communicate with taxpayers.
highlight.zh: Just Appraised 運用 AI 讓地方稅務評估員處理房產過戶的流程快 10 倍,減輕文書負擔並改善稅務單位與納稅人的溝通方式。

summary.en: Turnkey security and cyber insurance from leading insurers.
summary.zh: 由領先保險公司提供的一站式資安防護與網路保險。

highlight.en: Upfort pairs turnkey security that proactively mitigates risk with comprehensive cyber insurance, using proprietary data and AI to anticipate risk and streamline underwriting.
highlight.zh: Upfort 將主動降低風險的一站式資安防護與完整網路保險結合,運用專有資料與 AI 預測風險並簡化核保流程。

summary.en: Software that lets banks open new accounts digitally.
summary.zh: 讓銀行能數位化開戶的軟體。

highlight.en: Prelim helps banks and financial institutions digitize services and streamline account opening, making customer onboarding fast, efficient, and user-friendly.
highlight.zh: Prelim 協助銀行與金融機構將服務數位化、簡化開戶流程,讓顧客導入變得快速、高效且易於使用。

summary.en: AI platform unifying building codes, assemblies, products, and specs.
summary.zh: 整合建築規範、組件、產品與規格的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: UpCodes uses NLP to parse 6,000+ U.S. building codes into a searchable library, powering an AI code-to-spec workflow for 800,000 monthly active design and construction users.
highlight.zh: UpCodes 運用 NLP 解析逾 6,000 種美國建築規範並建成可搜尋的資料庫,為每月 80 萬活躍用戶提供 AI 規範對規格的工作流程。

summary.en: An AI recruiter that finds and engages candidates for hard-to-fill roles.
summary.zh: 為難招職缺找尋並接觸人選的 AI 招募工具。

highlight.en: Sourceress builds tailored machine learning models to define a role, identify strong candidates, and reach them with personalized intros that hiring managers welcome over 85% of the time.
highlight.zh: Sourceress 建立量身打造的機器學習模型來定義職缺、找出優秀人選,並以個人化邀約接觸他們,逾 85% 獲招募主管青睞。

summary.en: Building a new form of air transportation.
summary.zh: 打造全新形態的空中運輸。

highlight.en: Skyways is developing a new form of air transportation aimed at advancing how people and goods move through the skies.
highlight.zh: Skyways 正開發一種全新形態的空中運輸,旨在推進人員與貨物在空中的移動方式。

summary.en: Quality management software and consulting for life science compliance.
summary.zh: 為生命科學合規提供品質管理軟體與顧問服務。

highlight.en: Enzyme offers online quality management software plus QA/RA consulting to help life science companies win FDA approval and stay compliant, backed by 50+ years of medical device experience.
highlight.zh: Enzyme 提供線上品質管理軟體與 QA/RA 顧問服務,協助生命科學公司取得 FDA 核准並持續合規,團隊具備逾 50 年醫療器材經驗。

summary.en: Group chat built for gaming communities.
summary.zh: 為遊戲社群打造的群組聊天工具。

highlight.en: Guilded upgrades group chat for gaming communities, equipping servers with integrated event calendars, forums, and more.
highlight.zh: Guilded 為遊戲社群升級群組聊天,讓伺服器內建活動行事曆、論壇等功能。

summary.en: Marketplace for payroll loans to pensioners and government workers in Brazil.
summary.zh: 為巴西退休者與公務員提供薪資貸款的市集。

highlight.en: bxblue is a personal loan marketplace for Brazilian pensioners and government workers with guaranteed income, taking an $80 billion market online.
highlight.zh: bxblue 是為有保障收入的巴西退休者與公務員打造的個人貸款市集,將一個 800 億美元的市場搬上線。

summary.en: Platform for generating realistic AI personas from photos and video.
summary.zh: 從相片與影片生成擬真 AI 角色的平台。

highlight.en: D-ID's patented video reenactment technology animates still photos and creates AI personas; it originally built the first facial de-identification tool to shield images from facial recognition.
highlight.zh: D-ID 以專利的影片重演技術讓靜態相片動起來並生成 AI 角色;最初打造了首個臉部去識別化工具,保護影像免受臉部辨識。

summary.en: Data-driven hiring software that helps schools recruit better teachers.
summary.zh: 以資料驅動、協助學校招募更優秀教師的軟體。

highlight.en: Nimble's smart applicant tracking system uses predictive analytics to help K-12 districts identify and hire the best educators, expanding student access to excellent teachers.
highlight.zh: Nimble 的智慧應徵者追蹤系統運用預測分析,協助 K-12 學區辨識並錄用最優秀的教育者,擴大學生接觸優良教師的機會。

summary.en: Battery technology company improving the longevity of batteries.
summary.zh: 提升電池壽命的電池技術公司。

highlight.en: Advano combines nanotechnology with chemical engineering fundamentals to extend battery longevity and accelerate the renewable energy revolution.
highlight.zh: Advano 結合奈米科技與化工基本原理來延長電池壽命,加速再生能源革命。

summary.en: Latin America's mobile financial super app.
summary.zh: 拉丁美洲的行動金融超級 App。

highlight.en: Through its mobile wallet, tpaga lets Latin American consumers receive, store, and send money by phone, packing virtually all of a bank's value into a single app.
highlight.zh: tpaga 透過行動錢包讓拉美消費者用手機收取、儲存與匯款,將銀行幾乎所有的價值濃縮進單一 App。

summary.en: Software helping oncologists choose personalized cancer treatments.
summary.zh: 協助腫瘤科醫師選擇個人化癌症療法的軟體。

highlight.en: CCG.ai builds software for data-driven precision oncology, developing biomarkers from clinical and genomic data to help doctors pick the right drug at the right time for each patient.
highlight.zh: CCG.ai 打造資料驅動的精準腫瘤學軟體,從臨床與基因資料開發生物標記,協助醫師為每位病患在對的時機選對藥物。

summary.en: Software bringing efficiency and transparency to construction finance.
summary.zh: 為營建融資帶來效率與透明度的軟體。

highlight.en: Rabbet (formerly Contract Simply) uses machine learning to parse documents and connect data, cutting admin work and speeding decisions for real estate lenders and developers.
highlight.zh: Rabbet(前身為 Contract Simply)運用機器學習解析文件並串接資料,減少行政工作並加速房地產貸方與開發商的決策。

summary.en: Customer intelligence platform for enterprise CX teams.
summary.zh: 為企業客戶體驗團隊打造的客戶洞察平台。

highlight.en: Thematic delivers traceable customer intelligence for enterprise CX, with customers seeing NPS gains of 5 to 35 points and a Forrester-measured 543% three-year ROI; DoorDash and BNY use it.
highlight.zh: Thematic 為企業客戶體驗提供可追溯的客戶洞察,客戶 NPS 提升 5 到 35 分,Forrester 量測三年 ROI 達 543%,DoorDash 與 BNY 皆採用。

summary.en: Decarbonized heat and power cheaper than fossil fuels.
summary.zh: 比化石燃料更便宜的去碳化熱能與電力。

highlight.en: Airthium's high-temperature heat pumps make up to 3x more heat per unit of electricity at up to 1000°F, with the same engine later targeting seasonal energy storage to cut global CO2.
highlight.zh: Airthium 的高溫熱泵在高達 1000°F 下每單位電力可產出多達 3 倍熱能,同款引擎日後將切入季節性儲能,以減少全球二氧化碳排放。

summary.en: Conversational AI care companion for people with chronic conditions.
summary.zh: 為慢性病患者打造的對話式 AI 照護夥伴。

highlight.en: Cairns Health's voice AI gives medication reminders, symptom checks, and friendly conversation, paired with radar that passively monitors heart rate, breathing, and sleep without a wearable.
highlight.zh: Cairns Health 的語音 AI 提供用藥提醒、症狀檢查與友善對話,並搭配雷達在無需穿戴裝置下被動監測心率、呼吸與睡眠。

summary.en: New processes and technology to assemble apartment buildings faster and cheaper.
summary.zh: 用新流程與技術更快、更省地組裝公寓大樓。

highlight.en: Social Construct invents processes and technologies to assemble high-quality apartment buildings faster and for less, so more people can afford to live where they love.
highlight.zh: Social Construct 發明新流程與技術,以更快、更省的方式組裝高品質公寓大樓,讓更多人能負擔得起住在心儀之地。

summary.en: The easiest way to buy 74k+ crypto tokens with US dollars.
summary.zh: 用美元購買逾 7.4 萬種加密代幣最簡便的方式。

highlight.en: Dharma is an Ethereum wallet that moves money seamlessly between US bank accounts and decentralized exchanges like Uniswap, making DeFi investing feel like Coinbase on steroids.
highlight.zh: Dharma 是一款以太坊錢包,能在美國銀行帳戶與 Uniswap 等去中心化交易所間無縫轉移資金,讓 DeFi 投資體驗如同強化版的 Coinbase。

summary.en: Automated factory producing insect protein for farm animals.
summary.zh: 為農場動物生產昆蟲蛋白的自動化工廠。

highlight.en: Entocycle vertically farms insects with automation to produce protein far more efficiently than traditional methods, offering farmers a sustainable alternative to soymeal and fishmeal.
highlight.zh: Entocycle 以自動化垂直養殖昆蟲,生產蛋白質的效率遠勝傳統方法,為農民提供取代豆粕與魚粉的永續選擇。

summary.en: Speech synthesis technology for developers.
summary.zh: 為開發者打造的語音合成技術。

highlight.en: Lyrebird offers a new generation of speech synthesis for developers, the result of months of research at the MILA lab at the University of Montréal.
highlight.zh: Lyrebird 為開發者提供新世代的語音合成技術,源自蒙特婁大學 MILA 實驗室數月的研究成果。

summary.en: Managed marketplace for automotive repair and services.
summary.zh: 汽車維修與保養的代管市集。

highlight.en: CarDash picks up your car from home or work, oversees the repair, and returns it, with upfront transparent pricing and an advocate role so you're never overcharged.
highlight.zh: CarDash 到府或到公司取車、監督維修並送回,搭配透明的事前報價並以倡議者角色確保你不會被超收費用。

summary.en: Tool for creating and running collaborative online learning experiences.
summary.zh: 用於建立與經營協作式線上學習體驗的工具。

highlight.en: Eduflow powers active online learning at thousands of institutions from middle school to corporate training at Google, building activities that make learners active participants.
highlight.zh: Eduflow 為從中學到 Google 企業培訓的數千個機構提供主動式線上學習,打造讓學習者主動參與的學習活動。

summary.en: Banks your adult stem cells to help you live healthier, longer.
summary.zh: 保存你的成體幹細胞,助你活得更健康、更長壽。

highlight.en: Forever Labs collects and stores adult stem cells and develops therapies based on stem cell rejuvenation, aiming to help people live healthier for longer.
highlight.zh: Forever Labs 採集並保存成體幹細胞,並開發以幹細胞再生為基礎的療法,目標是助人活得更健康、更長壽。

summary.en: Group video calling social network for friends old and new.
summary.zh: 讓你與舊友新識視訊聊天的群組視訊社群網路。

highlight.en: Fam is a group video calling social network for talking with friends and making new ones; it was part of YC's Summer 2017 batch under the name FriendSpot.
highlight.zh: Fam 是一個群組視訊社群網路,讓你與朋友聊天並結識新朋友;曾以 FriendSpot 之名參與 YC 2017 年夏季梯次。

summary.en: Genetic profiling that helps doctors pick the right cancer drug per patient.
summary.zh: 協助醫師為每位患者選對抗癌藥物的基因檢測。

highlight.en: Oncobox offers low-cost personalized genetic profiling to guide drug choice; a 900-patient study found it raised targeted therapy effectiveness from 25% to 64% in late-stage cancers.
highlight.zh: Oncobox 提供低成本的個人化基因檢測以引導用藥;一項 900 名患者的研究發現,它使晚期癌症標靶治療的有效率從 25% 提升至 64%。

summary.en: AR neck-worn device using audio and haptics to assist blind users.
summary.zh: 以音訊與觸覺輔助視障者的擴增實境頸戴裝置。

highlight.en: Sunu Nek uses radar, haptics, and audio to alert visually impaired users to obstacles in real time and orient them via GPS voice features, aiming to become a universal human interface.
highlight.zh: Sunu Nek 運用雷達、觸覺與音訊即時提醒視障者周遭障礙物,並透過 GPS 語音功能引導方向,目標是成為通用的人機介面。

summary.en: Next-generation tools for the hybrid workplace.
summary.zh: 為混合辦公打造的新世代工具。

highlight.en: Officely lets teams see who's in, book desks, and share plans, while giving office admins user-friendly metrics on attendance and space usage to gain critical insights.
highlight.zh: Officely 讓團隊查看誰在辦公室、預約座位並分享計畫,同時提供管理者出勤與空間使用的易讀數據以獲得關鍵洞察。

summary.en: Developer-oriented security platform protecting applications from attacks.
summary.zh: 保護應用程式免於攻擊的開發者導向資安平台。

highlight.en: Templarbit is a developer-oriented security platform that helps companies of all sizes protect their software from malicious activity.
highlight.zh: Templarbit 是一個開發者導向的資安平台,協助各種規模的公司保護其軟體免受惡意活動侵害。

summary.en: Platform for unique products made on demand at mass scale.
summary.zh: 以大規模隨需生產獨特商品的平台。

highlight.en: VIDA connects global designers, producers, and consumers to make only what is purchased, offering an ethical, made-on-demand alternative to homogeneous, disposable retail.
highlight.zh: VIDA 串連全球的設計師、生產者與消費者,只生產被購買的商品,提供取代同質、用後即棄零售的符合道德、隨需生產的選擇。

summary.en: Water marketplace that improves urban water distribution in India.
summary.zh: 改善印度都市供水分配的水務市集。

highlight.en: NextDrop crowdsources water data and builds algorithms to improve urban water distribution, texting residents before supply arrives and serving 70,000 users across Karnataka.
highlight.zh: NextDrop 群眾外包供水資料並建立演算法以改善都市供水分配,在供水到來前簡訊通知居民,於卡納塔卡邦服務 7 萬名用戶。

summary.en: Code review as a service combining automation with expert reviewers.
summary.zh: 結合自動化與專家審查者的程式碼審查服務。

highlight.en: PullRequest blends static analysis with an on-demand network of code review experts to help development teams ship code faster with higher quality and lower costs.
highlight.zh: PullRequest 將靜態分析與隨需的程式碼審查專家網路結合,協助開發團隊更快交付、品質更高、成本更低的程式碼。

summary.en: App that turns long-form print journalism into narrated audio.
summary.zh: 把長篇紙本新聞轉成專業朗讀音訊的 App。

highlight.en: Audm uses professional voice actors to narrate long-form journalism into digital audio, turning in-depth print news into an enjoyable listening experience.
highlight.zh: Audm 聘請專業配音員將長篇新聞報導朗讀成數位音訊,把深度紙本新聞變成令人享受的收聽體驗。

summary.en: Makes buying and owning indoor potted plants easy.
summary.zh: 讓購買與照顧室內盆栽變得輕鬆。

highlight.en: Léon & George is a California ecommerce retailer of premium plants and ceramics, known for streamlined local delivery and custom-engineered packaging for nationwide shipping.
highlight.zh: Léon & George 是加州的電商零售商,銷售高級植物與陶器,以順暢的在地配送與專為全國運送設計的客製包裝聞名。

summary.en: Marketplace for local culinary experiences and classes.
summary.zh: 在地烹飪體驗與課程的市集。

highlight.en: CocuSocial is a marketplace for cooking, baking, and tasting classes hosted at restaurants and hotels, aiming to educate, entertain, and connect people through culinary experiences.
highlight.zh: CocuSocial 是一個烹飪、烘焙與品嚐課程的市集,課程在餐廳與飯店舉辦,旨在透過美食體驗教育、娛樂並連結人們。

summary.en: Complete listing toolkit for real estate agents.
summary.zh: 為房地產經紀人打造的完整刊登工具組。

highlight.en: Disclosures.io makes the home-selling process more transparent and efficient, helping sellers get to market faster and enabling buyers to make better-informed offers.
highlight.zh: Disclosures.io 讓賣房流程更透明、更有效率,協助賣家更快進入市場,並讓買家能做出更明智的出價。

summary.en: Motorbike rental marketplace connecting riders in India.
summary.zh: 連結印度騎士的機車租賃市集。

highlight.en: WheelStreet is India's first aggregator-model bike rental platform, offering 1,900+ two-wheelers with home delivery, free helmets, unlimited kilometres, and flexible rental durations.
highlight.zh: WheelStreet 是印度首個採聚合模式的機車租賃平台,提供逾 1,900 輛二輪車,含到府配送、免費安全帽、不限里程與彈性租期。

summary.en: AI workspace and digital storefront for staffing and recruiting teams.
summary.zh: 為人力派遣與招募團隊打造的 AI 工作空間與數位門面。

highlight.en: Candidately sits on top of Bullhorn and other ATS platforms with five products, using semantic search to rediscover hidden candidates, reach 250M+ web profiles, and build client-ready resumes.
highlight.zh: Candidately 疊加於 Bullhorn 等 ATS 之上,提供五項產品,以語意搜尋重新發掘隱藏人選、觸及逾 2.5 億個網路檔案,並產生客戶就緒的履歷。

summary.en: Mobile-ad polling that helps governments understand citizen sentiment.
summary.zh: 透過行動廣告民調協助政府了解民意的服務。

highlight.en: Elucd is a GovTech company that polls residents through mobile ads, giving cities a near real-time understanding of how citizens feel about their government.
highlight.zh: Elucd 是一家政府科技公司,透過行動廣告進行民調,讓城市近乎即時地掌握市民對政府的觀感。

summary.en: Early detection of Alzheimer's disease from non-invasive MRI.
summary.zh: 從非侵入式 MRI 早期偵測阿茲海默症。

highlight.en: Darmiyan applies novel quantitative virtual microscopy to standard non-invasive MRI scans to detect Alzheimer's disease at an early stage.
highlight.zh: Darmiyan 將新型的定量虛擬顯微技術應用於標準的非侵入式 MRI 掃描,以早期偵測阿茲海默症。

summary.en: Video creative automation that customizes videos for better outcomes.
summary.zh: 客製化影片以提升成效的影音創意自動化工具。

highlight.en: Indivio's video creative automation lets marketing teams easily deliver dynamic, customized video experiences that are more relevant and improve business outcomes.
highlight.zh: Indivio 的影音創意自動化讓行銷團隊輕鬆交付動態、客製化的影片體驗,使內容更貼切並提升業務成效。

summary.en: Plant biotechnology company creating better cultivars.
summary.zh: 創造更優良品種的植物生技公司。

highlight.en: Rev Genomics provides breeders, growers, and retailers with novel plant cultivars that help them differentiate in high-value markets.
highlight.zh: Rev Genomics 為育種者、種植者與零售商提供新型植物品種,協助他們在高價值市場中做出區隔。

summary.en: Value-based retinal screening in primary care to prevent blindness.
summary.zh: 在基層醫療中進行價值導向的視網膜篩檢以預防失明。

highlight.en: Spect brings retinal screening into primary care to catch preventable vision diseases like diabetic retinopathy and glaucoma early, easing the burden on overstretched eye clinics.
highlight.zh: Spect 將視網膜篩檢帶進基層醫療,以及早發現糖尿病視網膜病變與青光眼等可預防的眼疾,減輕負荷沉重的眼科診所壓力。

summary.en: AI customer support agent that actually works for businesses.
summary.zh: 真正可用於企業的 AI 客服代理。

highlight.en: Percept.AI provides end-to-end AI-powered customer support, using deep learning and NLP to make support teams more intelligent and efficient at connecting with customers.
highlight.zh: Percept.AI 提供端到端的 AI 客服解決方案,運用深度學習與 NLP 讓客服團隊在與顧客互動時更聰明、更有效率。

summary.en: Vertically integrated, technology-enabled commercial construction.
summary.zh: 垂直整合、科技驅動的商業營建公司。

highlight.en: Aecore is a tech-enabled commercial contractor using automation and vertical integration, with in-house design, project managers, and engineers guiding clients from concept to completion.
highlight.zh: Aecore 是一家科技驅動的商業承包商,運用自動化與垂直整合,由內部設計、專案經理與工程師引導客戶從概念到完工。

summary.en: App that helps rideshare drivers earn up to 30% more.
summary.zh: 協助共乘司機多賺最多 30% 的 App。

highlight.en: Mystro lets on-demand drivers safely run Uber, Lyft, and other platforms at once and auto-accepts only the trips they want, earning them up to 30% more money.
highlight.zh: Mystro 讓隨需司機安全地同時跑 Uber、Lyft 等平台,並只自動接受他們想要的行程,使其收入最多增加 30%。

summary.en: Rapid, scalable diagnostic for SARS-CoV-2 and other conditions.
summary.zh: 可快速、可大量擴展的 SARS-CoV-2 等病症診斷工具。

highlight.en: PreDxion Bio's saliva-based antigen test scales to tens of millions of tests using semiconductor fab processes; its FDA Breakthrough origins lie in real-time cytokine monitoring of critical patients.
highlight.zh: PreDxion Bio 的唾液抗原檢測可透過半導體製程擴展至數千萬次檢測;其獲 FDA 突破性認證的源頭是危重病患的即時細胞激素監測技術。

summary.en: Builds better thrusters and propulsion for modern satellites.
summary.zh: 為現代衛星打造更優異推進器的公司。

highlight.en: Tesseract provides cost-effective propulsion components and systems for in-space applications across commercial satellites, robotic exploration missions, and human spaceflight.
highlight.zh: Tesseract 提供具成本效益的推進元件與系統,適用於商業衛星、機器人探測任務與載人太空飛行等太空應用。

summary.en: Prism Labs is a consumer technology startup.
summary.zh: Prism Labs 是一家消費性科技新創公司。

highlight.en: Prism Labs is a Summer 2017 YC-backed consumer startup, though detailed information about its product is not available.
highlight.zh: Prism Labs 是一家 YC 2017 年夏季梯次支持的消費性新創公司,惟其產品的詳細資訊尚不可得。
